what: An example dataset containing rocket league gameplay data — TDMZ443games
title: An example dataset containing rocket league gameplay data — TDMZ443games
text: particular dataset contains data three rocket league 3v3 matches played TDMZ443. collected using python script Rocket League Stats API.

title: An example dataset containing rocket league gameplay data — TDMZ443games
An example dataset containing rocket league gameplay data — TDMZ443games
text: data frame 43,362 rows 20 columns. Note: Boost, Speed, boolean fields contain data TDMZ443 teammates. timestamp integer timestamp created script written collect data TimeSeconds integer denoting second game data point recorded . 300 seconds game, 7 data points per second per player MatchGuid string globally-unique-identifier uniquely identifies game. dataset contains 3. Name string denoting player's gamer tag. 6 unique gamer tags per game. TeamNum integer denoting two teams specified player . 1 2. Score integer denoting player's score time data point collected Goals integer denoting number goals player time Assists integer denoting number assists player time Saves integer denoting number saves player time Shots integer denoting number shots player time Touches integer denoting number times player touched ball time CarTouches integer denoting number times player touched/bumped another player's car Demos integer denoting number demolitions player time Boost integer denoting much boost player time. 0-100. bBoosting boolean indicating whether player boosting time. Speed integer denoting speed player time "kph". bSupersonic boolean indicating whether player supersonic time bOnGround boolean indicating whether player ground time bOnWall boolean indicating whether player wall time. bDemolished boolean indicating whether player demolished time.

title: Calculates some basic aggregate stats for a specified player — stats_for_player
Calculates some basic aggregate stats for a specified player — stats_for_player
code: stats_for_player(TDMZ443games, name = "TDMZ443")     Stats for TDMZ443     Number_of_Ball_Touches       Number_Of_Goals       Number_Of_Saves       Average_Speed       Average_Boost       Percentage_Of_Time_Supersonic     68 1 4 51.66 54.81 16.8% stats_for_player(TDMZ443games, name = "TDMZ443", "D96D303C11F15617E1F59A8137901B26")     Stats for TDMZ443     Number_of_Ball_Touches       Number_Of_Goals       Number_Of_Saves       Average_Speed       Average_Boost       Percentage_Of_Time_Supersonic     68 1 1 50.73 54.40 16.3%
